nubsNob.liftsOpen: All 8 lifts, Rope Tow and the Space Worm.
nubsNob.xcTrails: All trails groomed, tracked and in great condition.
nubsNob.comments: Happy Mardi Gras! We are excited to welcome you to this family friendly event marking the official start of spring skiing. There is a costume contest, silly slalom, great music, the Soaker Cup and much more. A full schedule events is at the front desk. In addition to a great party the skiing continues to be very good thanks to the dumping of snow earlier this week and the work of our dedicated Grooming Crew. The soup of the day is corned beef and cabbage. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with food and an espresso bar. DJ CJ will play the Winter Garden at noon. Pete Kehoe and Michelle Chenard will perform at 3:45 p.m. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
